title: Magnetic Shower Seals | Sold in Pairs | Fits 4, 5 or 6mm Glass | 135° Magnet for Straight or Quadrant Doors | 2 Metres Long | MAG001 (200cm Lengths, Black)
features: Pair of Magnetic Door Seals for 4, 5 or 6mm glass doors
Can be used on straight, curved or quadrant sliding doors
Will close a gap between two doors of up to 20mm
Available in pairs only, 2000mm (2m long) or 2600mm (2.6m long)
Simply turn one seal up the other way to alter if the seals come together straight or at a slight angle
description: Product Description Key information for MAG001B What glass thickness will this seal fit on? This seal is suitable for glass that measures 4, 5 or 6mm thick. What size gap is this seal suitable for? This seal will seal any gap between two sliding panes of glass which measure 20mm or less, if being used on a pivoting (hinged) door then the gap would need to be 20mm and no less for the magnets to contact each other properly. What angle is this seal suitable for? This seal will work if you're doors meet at either 90° or 135°. Are these sold as pairs? Yes, these seals are sold as pairs only. If you only need one then we would still only sell them as pairs as there is no way of knowing if you would need the positively or negatively charged magnet to pair up to either your existing seal or frame. Can this seal be cut to the length that I require? Yes we recommend using either a small set of garden secateurs or a junior hacksaw. What lengths are available? This seal is available in 2000mm (2m), or 2600mm (2.6m) lengths. Further details for MAG001B This seal is comprised of a combination of high quality rigid PVC and a strong magnet which will comfortably grip any glass ranging from 4 to 6mm thick with no need for any additional adhesive. MAG001B will seal any gap between two sliding panes of glass measuring 20mm or less, if being used on a pivoting (hinged) door then the gap would need to be 20mm and no less to ensure that the two magnets have sufficient contact. These seals are sold as pairs only. If you're replacing just one length we would still only sell them as pairs because there is no way of knowing if you need the positively or negatively charged magnet to pair up to your existing seal or frame. This seal is available in either a sample length, 2000mm (2m), or 2600mm (2.6m) lengths. Installation of our seals is nice and easy. Simply push the seal onto the glass from below on one end and work your way along, pushing the seal up onto the glass as you go. Do not try to slide the seals along the glass as this can damage it.
